news.title:
JSW Energy confirms interest payment of Rs. 44.0 Cr (Gross) & Rs. 40.04 Cr (Net of TDS) for NCDs.
Payment made timely on due date, 04-Mar-2026; no changes in payment frequency or delays noted.
news.summary:
JSW Energy confirms interest payment of Rs. 44.0 Cr (Gross) & Rs. 40.04 Cr (Net of TDS) for NCDs.
Payment made timely on due date, 04-Mar-2026; no changes in payment frequency or delays noted.

news.title:
JSW Energy allotted 9.5M equity shares on a preferential basis to JTPM Metal Traders.
Trading approval received from BSE/NSE; shares locked till Sept 9, 2027.
news.summary:
JSW Energy allotted 9.5M equity shares on a preferential basis to JTPM Metal Traders.
Trading approval received from BSE/NSE; shares locked till Sept 9, 2027.

news.title:
India Ratings assigned 'IND A Positive' rating to JSW Energy (Kutehr) bank loans.
JSW Energy (Kutehr) is a step-down subsidiary of JSW Energy Ltd.
news.summary:
India Ratings assigned 'IND A Positive' rating to JSW Energy (Kutehr) bank loans.
JSW Energy (Kutehr) is a step-down subsidiary of JSW Energy Ltd.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.

news.title:
ICRA rated Solalite Power Pvt Ltd's long-term bank facilities at ICRA A (Stable).
Solalite Power is a step-down subsidiary of JSW Energy Ltd; rating shows stable creditworthiness.
news.summary:
ICRA rated Solalite Power Pvt Ltd's long-term bank facilities at ICRA A (Stable).
Solalite Power is a step-down subsidiary of JSW Energy Ltd; rating shows stable creditworthiness.

news.title:
JSW Energy Ltd announces a meeting with institutional investors and analysts on 24th Feb 2026 in Mumbai.
The meeting, part of Kotak Securities' 'Chasing Growth 2026', is subject to change if exigencies arise.
news.summary:
JSW Energy Ltd announces a meeting with institutional investors and analysts on 24th Feb 2026 in Mumbai.
The meeting, part of Kotak Securities' 'Chasing Growth 2026', is subject to change if exigencies arise.

news.title:
India's green hydrogen push targets 5 MMT by 2030, leveraging Rs 8T investments via National Green Hydrogen Mission with policy support and incentives.
Stocks like L&T, Indian Oil, JSW Energy, NTPC, and GSFC anchor the ecosystem, spanning infrastructure, production, and end-use, with gradual progress expected.
news.summary:
India's green hydrogen push targets 5 MMT by 2030, leveraging Rs 8T investments via National Green Hydrogen Mission with policy support and incentives.
Stocks like L&T, Indian Oil, JSW Energy, NTPC, and GSFC anchor the ecosystem, spanning infrastructure, production, and end-use, with gradual progress expected.

news.title:
Green energy companies showed mixed Q3 FY26 results, with Waaree Energies reporting 119% YoY revenue growth, Suzlon Energy's revenue up 42% YoY, and JSW Energy's profit surging 237% YoY.
KPI Green Energy's revenue grew 45% YoY, Borosil Renewables posted a 61% QoQ profit rise, while Saatvik Green Energy's profit jumped 147% YoY, boosted by strong order books and capacity expansions.
news.summary:
Green energy companies showed mixed Q3 FY26 results, with Waaree Energies reporting 119% YoY revenue growth, Suzlon Energy's revenue up 42% YoY, and JSW Energy's profit surging 237% YoY.
KPI Green Energy's revenue grew 45% YoY, Borosil Renewables posted a 61% QoQ profit rise, while Saatvik Green Energy's profit jumped 147% YoY, boosted by strong order books and capacity expansions.

news.title:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.
news.summary:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.

news.title:
Tata Motors CV, HDFC AMC, Muthoot Finance, and others are potential inclusions in Nifty Next 50 during March rejig, replacing stocks like Info Edge and JSW Energy.
Tata Motors CV inclusion could see $143M inflows; exclusions like Bajaj Housing may lead to $14M-$80M outflows per Nuvama Alternative.
news.summary:
Tata Motors CV, HDFC AMC, Muthoot Finance, and others are potential inclusions in Nifty Next 50 during March rejig, replacing stocks like Info Edge and JSW Energy.
Tata Motors CV inclusion could see $143M inflows; exclusions like Bajaj Housing may lead to $14M-$80M outflows per Nuvama Alternative.

news.title:
JSW Energy states no significant nuclear power investments planned currently.
Company to assess power sector opportunities and adhere to SEBI update rules.
news.summary:
JSW Energy states no significant nuclear power investments planned currently.
Company to assess power sector opportunities and adhere to SEBI update rules.

news.title:
JSW Neo Energy acquired Tidong Power from Statkraft, valued at ₹1,728 crore.
Tidong, a 150 MW hydro project in Himachal Pradesh, will commission by Oct 2026.
news.summary:
JSW Neo Energy acquired Tidong Power from Statkraft, valued at ₹1,728 crore.
Tidong, a 150 MW hydro project in Himachal Pradesh, will commission by Oct 2026.

news.title:
JSW Energy confirms redemption of commercial paper on 28th Jan 2026.
Company requests BSE to delist scrip code post successful repayment.
news.summary:
JSW Energy confirms redemption of commercial paper on 28th Jan 2026.
Company requests BSE to delist scrip code post successful repayment.

news.title: JSW Energy targets 15 GW capacity by FY26 and may raise ₹10,000 crore if needed.
news.summary: JSW Energy targets 15 GW capacity by FY26 and may raise ₹10,000 crore if needed.

news.title: JSW Energy reported a 5.6% growth in power demand for December.
news.summary: JSW Energy reported a 5.6% growth in power demand for December.

news.title: JSW Energy faces pressure after Q3 results; profit aided by ₹750.8 Cr deferred tax write-back.
news.summary: JSW Energy faces pressure after Q3 results; profit aided by ₹750.8 Cr deferred tax write-back.

news.title:
JSW Energy executed a block trade on NSE for 770,229 shares at Rs. 431.65.
The total transaction value for the block trade amounted to Rs. 33.25 crores.
news.summary:
JSW Energy executed a block trade on NSE for 770,229 shares at Rs. 431.65.
The total transaction value for the block trade amounted to Rs. 33.25 crores.

news.title:
JSW Energy and Godrej Consumer Products shares plunged 10% post-Q3 results, while India Cements rose 5%.
JSW Energy's profit grew 150% YoY, but missed estimates; Godrej Consumer's net profit declined; India Cements showed operational improvements.
news.summary:
JSW Energy and Godrej Consumer Products shares plunged 10% post-Q3 results, while India Cements rose 5%.
JSW Energy's profit grew 150% YoY, but missed estimates; Godrej Consumer's net profit declined; India Cements showed operational improvements.

news.title:
JSW Energy shares fell 10% after Jefferies downgraded the stock.
Jefferies also reduced its estimates for JSW Energy.
news.summary:
JSW Energy shares fell 10% after Jefferies downgraded the stock.
Jefferies also reduced its estimates for JSW Energy.

news.title:
JSW Energy sees reduced renewable energy bids due to 40 GW of pending agreements.
The company anticipates new connectivity challenges emerging from FY27.
news.summary:
JSW Energy sees reduced renewable energy bids due to 40 GW of pending agreements.
The company anticipates new connectivity challenges emerging from FY27.
